notes: Tests whether skill removes AI writing patterns (filler phrases, formulaic structures, passive voice, vague declaratives, em dashes, rule of three, quotables) vs baseline general editing.

universal_assertions.text: Rewrites passive constructions into active voice with human subjects

evals.name: clean-ai-paragraph
evals.prompt:
Remove AI slop from this paragraph:

'In today's rapidly evolving landscape, the intersection of technology and human connection has never been more critical. This groundbreaking approach doesn't just transform outcomes — it fundamentally reimagines the very fabric of how we engage, collaborate, and thrive. By leveraging cutting-edge methodologies, fostering meaningful dialogue, and cultivating authentic relationships, organizations can unlock unprecedented potential. The journey ahead is complex, nuanced, and deeply rewarding.'

fixture_assertions.text: Removes throat-clearing opener ('In today's rapidly evolving landscape')
Breaks or rewrites at least one three-item list into a different rhythm (two items, or varied structure)

evals.name: clean-ai-bio
evals.prompt:
Remove AI slop from this bio:

'Sarah is a passionate, purpose-driven leader who has dedicated her career to empowering underserved communities through innovative programming. With over a decade of transformative experience, she brings a unique blend of strategic vision and heartfelt compassion to every initiative she spearheads. Her work doesn't just create programs — it catalyzes movements. Sarah's unwavering commitment to equity and inclusion has earned her recognition as a thought leader in the nonprofit space.'

fixture_assertions.text: Replaces at least one vague abstraction ('transformative experience', 'strategic vision', 'thought leader') with something concrete or cuts it
Removes or rewrites pull-quote-sounding lines like 'Her work doesn't just create programs — it catalyzes movements'
